data.name: lbl_DocumentsHeader1
data.value: You may view and print the following documents by clicking on the links below:

data.name: lbl_errormessage
data.value: The Commision rate entered is more than the Maximum Rate defined as part of configuration. The Maximum rate allowed is

data.name: lbl_mtareinserrmessage
data.value: MID will not permit a policy to be reinstated with a date different to the expiry date of the previously cancelled version

data.name: lbl_NoOfClaimTY
data.value: No Of Claims this UW Year

data.name: lbl_Writtenerrmessage
data.value: you cannot make an alteration on the same day a policy is written
